seoDescription: Join a team that values practical expertise, safety, and engineering excellence.

hero.heading: Careers & Opportunities
hero.body: Build your career with GenFix across technical service, project delivery, and customer support roles in a safety-first operating environment.

sections.title: Why Work With GenFix
sections.body: GenFix invests in practical capability, teamwork, and reliable field execution, with clear pathways for growth.

cards.title: Field-First Culture
cards.description: Work alongside experienced technicians and project teams solving real operational problems.

cards.title: Training And Mentoring
cards.description: Structured onboarding and ongoing development support technical confidence and career progression.

cards.title: Diverse Project Exposure
cards.description: Contribute across rental, service, and turnkey projects in demanding site environments.

sections.title: Current Opportunity Areas
sections.body: We regularly hire for roles that support safe delivery, customer outcomes, and operational excellence.

cards.title: Field Service Technicians
cards.description: Diagnose, repair, and maintain diesel generator systems across active client sites.

cards.title: Project And Site Coordinators
cards.description: Coordinate mobilisation, documentation, and handover activities across project milestones.

cards.title: Sales And Account Support
cards.description: Help clients define requirements and align solutions to real operational needs.
